item.text: {"id":"urn:molaug-v0:duty","verdict":"REPAIR","gloss_scholarly":true,"explication_carries_gloss":false,"self_flag_correct":true,"sense_collision_free":true,"reason":"The rendering identifies a work task whose omission the person knows many would judge wrong, but it does not encode normative binding and narrows work-or-position duties to paid work; add a prime-level obligation/role source or narrow the gloss accordingly."}
